name: code-dedupe
description: Scan projects for duplicate or structurally similar code blocks, group them, and suggest refactorings into shared functions.
intent_triggers: 掃描專案中的重複程式碼
幫我找出相似的程式碼片段
偵測跨檔案的重複區塊
生成重構建議統一函式
計算這個專案的重複率
find duplicate code in the project
detect similar code blocks across files
report the duplication rate of the codebase
show me repeated patterns in the repo
幫我檢查這個 repo 有多少重複程式碼

path.description: Project directory or file path to scan

min_lines.description: Minimum number of lines to consider a duplicate

cross_file.description: Only detect duplicates across different files

examples.intent: 掃描 src/ 目錄中的重複程式碼
設定相似度閾值為 0.9 並跨檔案偵測
生成重構建議並預覽程式碼
